task: Build the Flowntier ChiefApp — an Android client for the desktop runtime (orchestrator + 8-phase workflow + status poll)
summary:
Chairman: 'flowntier的主理给它做成app,风格一致安卓' (chief is the orchestrator — make it an Android app, same style as the existing iching-oracle Android app).

Built apps/ChiefApp/ from scratch as a sibling project, reusing the same Kotlin + Compose + Material3 + ink-and-paper palette as IChingOracle:

* Gradle scaffold (settings/build/gradle.properties copied from iching-oracle, libs.versions.toml extended with OkHttp 4.12.0 + kotlinx-coroutines 1.8.1 for the HTTP client)
* AndroidManifest with INTERNET permission, usesCleartextTraffic=true (LAN-only, talks to the desktop runtime on 127.0.0.1/192.168.x.x:8765)
* Backup / data-extraction rules in xml/
* Adaptive launcher icon (mipmap-anydpi-v26 + drawable/ic_launcher_foreground.xml — concentric circles evoking the 8 phases)
* Material3 DayNight.NoActionBar theme with statusBarColor=transparent

Source files (all under com.thatgfsj.chief):

* data/RuntimeClient.kt — OkHttp 3.1, JSON-RPC 2.0 client:
  - startWorkflow(task) → wf_id in ~50ms (orchestrator runs async per event 000069)
  - getStatus(wfId) → parses /api/workflow/{wf_id}/status response
  - ping() → health check for the settings pane
* ChiefViewModel.kt — small state machine (Idle / Sending / Running / Error); polls /status every 2s; stops when phase is terminal
* ui/oracle/ChiefScreen.kt — single screen with:
  - Centered header (serif, primary teal)
  - Host field (monospace, shows runtime IP:port)
  - Multiline task field + 派发 button
  - PhaseTimeline card — 8 rows (1-需求 … 8-交付), each with a dot (● done / ◉ active / ○ pending) + LinearProgressIndicator for tasks_done/tasks_total
  - Summary card — shows the chief's final user-facing summary when 8-delivery finishes; falls back to 'chief 还在写,稍等…' while still running
  - Error banner if the runtime is unreachable
* ui/theme/Theme.kt — exact port of IChingOracle's Theme.kt (DarkColorScheme teal, LightColorScheme paper, Serif typography)
* MainActivity.kt — single-activity host, edge-to-edge, wires up the VM + theme

Verified end-to-end:
* `./gradlew :app:assembleDebug` — BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 28s
* `app-debug.apk` — 13,739,657 bytes, valid Android package (file(1) reports 'Android package (APK), with gradle app-metadata.properties')
* Manifest declares INTERNET permission, MainActivity as LAUNCHER, Theme.ChiefApp, applicationId com.thatgfsj.chief, minSdk 26, targetSdk 34

Not verified (blocked on missing toolchain):
* Could not boot an Android emulator — the SDK at O:/Android-sdk/ has platform-tools, build-tools, and platforms, but no emulator binary installed. The chairman will need to install the APK on a real device or set up an AVD + emulator separately. Debug APK is signed with the local debug keystore so it installs without further signing.
* Could not verify runtime connectivity — the chief app's RuntimeClient uses loopback 127.0.0.1 by default; chairman will need to enter the desktop runtime's LAN IP. Documented in apps/ChiefApp/README.md.

Side note for the chairman:
* The Flow / Frontier project now has two Android apps (iching-oracle + chief-app) sharing the same Kotlin+Compose+Material3 stack. If you want, v0.2 of chief-app can fold the IChingOracle UI in as a sub-screen (draw a hexagram instead of typing a task) so the chief app becomes a single front door for the whole Flowntier system.
reason: Chairman: 'flowntier的主理给它做成app,风格一致安卓'. '主理' = chief, the orchestrator role. The chairman wants a phone-side surface for the new 8-phase workflow (event 000068) and a consistent visual identity with the existing IChingOracle Android app.
